email.errors/MalformedHeaderDefect.name: MalformedHeaderDefect
email.errors/MalformedHeaderDefect.description: A header was found that was missing a colon, or was otherwise malformed. Deprecated since version 3.3: This defect has not been used for several Python versions.

info.excerpt: A header was found that was missing a colon, or was otherwise malformed. Deprecated since version 3.3: This defect has not been used for several Python versions.

email.errors/MessageDefect.name: MessageDefect
email.errors/MessageDefect.description: This is the base class for all defects found when parsing email messages. It is derived from ValueError.

info.excerpt: This is the base class for all defects found when parsing email messages. It is derived from ValueError.

email.errors/MessageError.name: MessageError
email.errors/MessageError.description: This is the base class for all exceptions that the email package can raise. It is derived from the standard Exception class and defines no additional methods.

info.excerpt: This is the base class for all exceptions that the email package can raise. It is derived from the standard Exception class and defines no additional methods.

email.errors/MessageParseError.name: MessageParseError
email.errors/MessageParseError.description: This is the base class for exceptions raised by the Parser class. It is derived from MessageError. This class is also used internally by the parser used by headerregistry.

info.excerpt: This is the base class for exceptions raised by the Parser class. It is derived from MessageError. This class is also used internally by the parser used by headerregistry.

email.errors/MisplacedEnvelopeHeaderDefe.name: MisplacedEnvelopeHeaderDefect
email.errors/MisplacedEnvelopeHeaderDefe.description: A “Unix From” header was found in the middle of a header block.

info.excerpt: A “Unix From” header was found in the middle of a header block.

email.errors/MissingHeaderBodySeparatorD.name: MissingHeaderBodySeparatorDefect
email.errors/MissingHeaderBodySeparatorD.description: A line was found while parsing headers that had no leading white space but contained no ‘:’. Parsing continues assuming that the line represents the first line of the body. Added in version 3.3.

info.excerpt: A line was found while parsing headers that had no leading white space but contained no ‘:’. Parsing continues assuming that the line represents the first line of the body. Added in version 3.3.

email.errors/MultipartConversionError.name: MultipartConversionError
email.errors/MultipartConversionError.description: Raised if the attach() method is called on an instance of a class derived from MIMENonMultipart (e.g. MIMEImage). MultipartConversionError multiply inherits from MessageError and the built-in TypeError.

info.excerpt: Raised if the attach() method is called on an instance of a class derived from MIMENonMultipart (e.g. MIMEImage). MultipartConversionError multiply inherits from MessageError and the built-in TypeErro...

email.errors/MultipartInvariantViolation.name: MultipartInvariantViolationDefect
email.errors/MultipartInvariantViolation.description: A message claimed to be a multipart, but no subparts were found. Note that when a message has this defect, its is_multipart() method may return False even though its content type claims to be multipart.

info.excerpt: A message claimed to be a multipart, but no subparts were found. Note that when a message has this defect, its is_multipart() method may return False even though its content type claims to be multipar...
